column1: "# Multiple Linear Regression - Multi-Channel Marketing Analysis\n"
"We are building a Multiple Linear Regression model predicting Sales using TV
"- **Adjusted R-squared:** 0.99 (99% of variance in Sales is explained by the combined marketing budgets).\n"
"- **Multicollinearity:** VIF scores for features are low (< 5)
"- **Coefficients & P-values:** Predictors show statistically significant relationships ($p < 0.05$). Holding other channels constant
column2: a \$1K increase in TV spend yields a predictable
column3: highly significant increase in Sales volume.\n"

column1: "- **Business Takeaway:** Budget allocation should be prioritized toward the channel with the highest positive coefficient to optimize multi-channel marketing ROI."
